title: Other Useful Utilities for Use with ImageOp Objects
description:
Other Useful Utilities for Use with ImageOp Objects

Other Useful Utilities for Use with ImageOp Objects

When performing the Binarize Operation, you should examine the
				Histogram
 feature of Vision Guide. Histograms are useful because they graphically represent the distribution of grey-scale values within the Search Window

. You can use the Histogram tool to set the thresholds for binarization.
